issues.description: Missing condition for 'You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand'. The DSL should include a FlipLife action with target scope 'Life' before the PowerBoost, or as an alternative action. Current DSL only captures the power boost.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for '[Your Turn]' context (card gains power during this turn), but the missing FlipLife action should precede this.
